title: gRPC: High-Performance RPC for Microservices
author: Morgan Chen
Backend Engineer
description: Build efficient microservice APIs with gRPC and Protocol Buffers
content:
gRPC uses Protocol Buffers and HTTP/2 for efficient inter-service communication.

**Related Chronicles**: [The RPC Storm (2033)](/docs/articles/rpc-storm-2033)
